character.name:
Crimson queen mother boss, isometric pixel art, gothic horror. 
Tall imposing female figure with a long blood-red trailing gown 
that spreads wide at the base. Thin spider-like leg appendages 
visible at the sides of the lower body. Upper body has a regal 
corsage of dark crimson and black. Crown of blood and bone on head. 
Pale face with multiple glowing red eyes. Arms raised slightly, 
clawed hands. Colors: deep crimson #5a0010, black #050005, 
blood red glow #cc0022. Regal, monstrous, terrifying. 
Crisp pixel art, dark background, transparent if possible.
